metadata.name: Japanese Songs
metadata.description: Song lyrics with learner-friendly sentence-level analysis and chunks.

entries.title: THE HERO!! ～怒れる拳に火をつけろ～
entries.ja:
ONE PUNCH！
(Three！ Two！ One！ Kill shot！)
参上！　必勝！　至上最強！！
なんだってんだ？　フラストレーション　俺は止まらない

ONE PUNCH！　完了！　連戦連勝！
俺は喝！！　常に勝つ！！　圧勝！！

Power！ Get power！　ギリギリ限界まで

HERO　俺を讃える声や　喝采なんて　欲しくはないさ
HERO　だから　人知れず　悪と闘う
(Nobody knows who he is.)
天(そら)覆い　押し寄せる敵　俺は背を向けはしない
HERO　ならば　揺るぎなき覚悟したため　繰り出せ鉄拳

(Three！ Two！ One！ Fight back！)
参上！ Go on！　正々堂々！！
どうなってんだ？　なにも感じねぇ　もはや敵居ねー！

JUSTICE！　執行！　問答無用！
俺が断つ！！　悪を断つ！！　合掌！！

Power！ Get power！　アドレナリン溢れ出すぜ！
Power！ Get power！　鍛えた技をぶちかませ！

HERO　どんなに　強い奴も　ちっぽけなガキだったんだ
HERO　弱き　己乗り越え　強くなる
(Nobody knows who he is.)
神宿る　拳掲げて　俺は突き進むだけさ
HERO　いつか　敗北に汚泥なめるまで　闘うHERO

俺は諦めない　その胸に未来(あす)を描き
目覚め行く　世界へ今　舞い上がれ　強く高く
どんな時でも　なにがあっても

HERO　俺を讃える声や　喝采なんて　欲しくはないさ
HERO　だから　人知れず　悪と闘う
(Nobody knows who he is.)
神宿る　拳掲げて　俺は突き進むだけさ
HERO　いつか　敗北に汚泥なめるまで　闘うHERO
孤独なHERO
entries.en:
ONE PUNCH!
(Three! Two! One! Kill shot!)
Here I come! Certain victory! The absolute strongest!!
What is this? Frustration—I will not stop.

ONE PUNCH! Complete! Battle after battle, victory after victory!
I roar!! I always win!! Total victory!!

Power! Get power! Right up to the very limit.

HERO—I do not want voices praising me or applause.
HERO—so I fight evil without anyone knowing.
(Nobody knows who he is.)
As enemies surge in and cover the sky, I will not turn my back.
HERO—then, with unwavering resolve prepared, unleash the iron fist.

(Three! Two! One! Fight back!)
Here I come! Go on! Fair and square!!
What is going on? I do not feel anything anymore—there are no enemies left!

JUSTICE! Execute! No questions asked!
I cut down evil!! I sever evil!! Hands together in prayer!!

Power! Get power! Adrenaline is overflowing!
Power! Get power! Unleash the techniques you have trained!

HERO—even the strongest guy was once just a tiny kid.
HERO—overcoming the weak self, one becomes strong.
(Nobody knows who he is.)
With a god dwelling in my raised fist, I simply keep charging ahead.
HERO—until someday I taste defeat in the mud, I will fight, HERO.

I will not give up; I draw the future in my heart.
Into the awakening world now—rise up, strong and high.
At any time, no matter what happens.

HERO—I do not want voices praising me or applause.
HERO—so I fight evil without anyone knowing.
(Nobody knows who he is.)
With a god dwelling in my raised fist, I simply keep charging ahead.
HERO—until someday I taste defeat in the mud, I will fight, HERO.
A lonely HERO.
notes: Opening theme for One Punch Man anime.
Features both Japanese and English lyrics mixed throughout.
High-energy motivational song with anime action theme.

entries.title: 絆ノ奇跡
entries.album: 絆ノ奇跡 / コイコガレ
entries.ja:
闇夜を駆け抜けて　何処へ向かう
月明かりだけがただ一つの道標
痛みも悲しみも拭いきれず
されどこの胸の炎は消させない
誰が為に僕たちは
この想いを貫いて
闇を裂き　陽の下で
光さす日まで
解き放たれた心に宿した火よ
舞い上げ、まとえ　今　夜明けの向こう側へ
君がいるこの世界もう一度愛せるまで
我が命　果てようとも　繋いで行こう
絆が紡いで生まれた奇跡を
喜怒哀楽　夢　揺らめいてる現世
互いの正義をまた繰り返し振りかざす
誰が為に繋ぐ命
交わりもつれる運命
蛇の道　数多の罪
全て薙ぎ払え
解き放て今　僕らが起こした火を
舞い上げ走れば明日が変わるはず
君といるこの世界二度と離さずに
君と共に行く
瞼を閉じても思い出すあの日を
打ちのめされても焦がれた未来を
いつの日か君に捧げてみせよう
解き放たれた心に宿した火よ
舞い上げ、まとえ　今　夜明けの向こうへ
解き放て今　僕らが起こした火を
舞い上げ走れば
明日が変わるはず
君がいたこの世界もう一度愛せるまで
我が命　果てようとも　繋げていくよ
絆が紡いで生まれた奇跡を
entries.en:
Racing through the dark night, where are we heading?
Moonlight alone is the single guidepost.
I still cannot fully wipe away the pain or the sorrow,
and yet I will not let the flame in this chest be extinguished.
For whose sake do we
carry these feelings through to the end?
Tearing through the darkness, beneath the sun,
until the day the light shines through.
O fire dwelling in the heart that has been set free,
rise up and cloak us now, to the far side of dawn.
Until I can love this world you are in once more,
even if my life comes to an end, let us keep connecting onward.
The miracle born from bonds spun together.
Joy, anger, sorrow, delight, dreams, this flickering present world.
We once again brandish our own forms of justice again and again.
For whose sake are these lives connected?
Intertwining, entangling fate,
the serpent's path, the countless sins,
sweep it all away.
Set it free now, the fire we ignited.
If we rise up and run, tomorrow should change.
In this world where you are, never letting go again,
I will go on together with you.
Even when I close my eyes, I remember that day.
Even if I am beaten down, I remember the future I longed for.
Someday I will surely dedicate it to you.
O fire dwelling in the heart that has been set free,
rise up and cloak us now, toward the other side of dawn.
Set it free now, the fire we ignited.
If we rise up and run,
tomorrow should change.
Until I can love this world you were in once more,
even if my life comes to an end, I will keep carrying it on.
The miracle born from bonds spun together.
notes: Japanese lyrics were added from a user-provided paste and still include inline reading hints.
Opening theme song for Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Swordsmith Village Arc.
